title: Sprint 180 Fase 6 completa: findings, risk/debt/impact, contracts, testgen, bago_utils, 68 routes, 48 tests
motivation: Completar la Fase 6 con pipeline de salud→rendimiento comercial: findings engine, risk_matrix, debt_ledger, impact_engine, contracts (C001-C003), RULE-CDTR-001, bago_utils compartido, testgen para repos desconocidos. 68 routing entries y 48/48 tests.
details: 13 nuevas herramientas: findings_engine (modelo unificado), scan (linter runner), hotspot (git+complexity heatmap), autofix (patch+validate), gh_integration (Check Runs + PR reviews), risk_matrix (taxonomía 4 categorías), debt_ledger (quadrantes + €/hr), impact_engine (health→€/trimestre FAIR), contracts (C001-C003 verificables), bago_utils (shared helpers), testgen (genera tests para repos desconocidos). Routing de 37→68 entradas. Tests 44→48/48 ALL PASS.
author: Sprint-180-BAGO
